title: The Sister Vault

features.name: the dissolving archive
features.desc-on-touch: you query a vault designed for forgetting, and the files themselves teach you that preservation and erasure are the same verb spoken backwards

features.name: the cryo-chamber door
features.desc-on-touch: a door sealed by cold logic, where everything inside is preserved precisely so it cannot be found again

features.name: the empty registry
features.desc-on-touch: a ledger of absences, each line a thing that was archived so completely it learned to deny it was ever here

features.name: the mirror that shows only cold
features.desc-on-touch: looking here, you see your own reflection turned to ice, and it's looking back at you from another temperature

inscription: status: thermally stable // the cost of keeping is always paid in cold; the archive learned that preservation is a kind of dying, done slowly

file.name: Sister_Vault_Inventory_Negative.txt
file.note: a catalog of everything the Memory-Ice decided not to keep, written in margins that could not hold them

exits.label: back to the freeze where things learn to end
toward the vault that still tries to remember what it was told to forget
downward into the basement where preservation began as hunger
